children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The composition of the board of directors of the corporation, and the responsibilities of the board, are as provided in the articles of incorporation of the corporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The positions of officers of the corporation, and the election of the officers, are as provided in the articles of incorporation.
